message:
Running command: # Log at 14:05 (4.5 min). GRT re-routing with antenna fixes.
# Antenna repair step 67 still running (38.5 min elapsed).
# Previous run had this step complete in ~5 min after antenna fix.
# Something might be slow. Let me check OR process.
ps aux | grep "openroad" | grep -v bash | grep -v grep | awk '{print $8,$3,$4,$7}' | head -5
